cards.title: Validator Inbox
cards.body: The review team can now send you messages directly in the app. Look for the envelope icon in the top bar. You can open any message and reply back — a red dot means something is waiting.

cards.title: Flag reasons
cards.body: When one of your judgements is flagged for review, you will now see the reason why alongside the flag. This helps you understand what to look out for in future entries.

cards.title: Title corrections
cards.body: Spotted a typo in the replication paper title or DOI? There is now a dedicated field to flag and correct it alongside the other correction inputs.

cards.title: Validator tiers
cards.body: The platform now tracks three tiers — Regular, Trusted, and Senior — reflecting your track record and unlocking additional responsibilities over time.
